---
title: "Results"
---

## Key findings (draft)
Add bullet points as you go.

## Figures
Add figures as you generate them. Example:

![](figures/PCA%20Liver.png)
![](figures/Volcano%20Plot.png)
![](figures/Heatmap.png)
![](figures/Top%2050%20Significant%20Genes%20Up%20and%20Down%20regulated.png)
![](figures/top50_downregulated.png)
![](figures/top50_upregulated.png)


```{r}
# If using R, put code here (optional)

# If using Python, put code here (optional)
